user_query: Add a zucchini noodle pesto bowl dinner option for mother on day 4

fields.name: Zucchini Noodle Pesto Bowl
fields.short_description: A light, low-carb bowl of spiralized zucchini tossed in a bright basil pesto with cherry tomatoes, toasted pine nuts, and shaved parmesan — fresh and satisfying for dinner.
fields.meal_suggestion: Spiralize 2–3 medium zucchini and lightly salt to draw out moisture; pat dry. Prepare a quick pesto by blending fresh basil, garlic, toasted pine nuts, lemon juice, olive oil, and a pinch of salt until smooth. Sauté the zucchini noodles briefly in a large pan with a little olive oil (1–2 minutes) to warm without making them soggy. Toss warm noodles with the pesto, halved cherry tomatoes, and a handful of baby spinach until wilted. Finish with toasted pine nuts and shaved parmesan. Serve immediately with an optional squeeze of lemon.
fields.nutrition_note: Low in carbohydrates and calories while high in vitamins A and C from zucchini and tomatoes. Basil and olive oil provide antioxidants and healthy fats; pine nuts add plant-based protein and magnesium. A light, nutrient-dense dinner option suitable for weight management or a lighter evening meal.

result.reasoning: Append as a new dinner option for Mother on Day 4 (position -1). The zucchini noodle pesto bowl provides a light, fresh alternative to heavier dinners and fits the user's requested dish.
